name: Fetuccine Primavera with Toasted Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli, cauliflower, and asparagus for 5-8 minutes or until tender-crisp.
2. In a large saucepan of boiling salted water, cook fresh fettuccine for 5-7 minutes (if using dried, cook for 12-15 minutes) until tender but firm. Drain well.
3. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Sauté onion for 3-5 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Add carrot, red pepper, and garlic; sauté for 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
5. Combine the drained pasta with the vegetable mixture, stock, basil, and black pepper. Toss with Parmesan cheese.
6. Arrange on a serving platter and sprinkle with toasted almonds.
